hooks.description: Inject agent-pipeline operating rules and available capabilities at session start

steps.message: The agent-pipeline plugin is active. Operating rules are in CLAUDE.md. Available agents: orchestrator, explorer, planner, plan-critic, implementer, tester, reviewer. Available skills: deliver, explore-task, plan-task, critique-plan, implement-task, test-task, review-task, replan-task, build-execution-graph. Key rules: (1) Every stage emits a strict YAML handoff artifact. (2) Revise = implementation issue, strategy valid. Replan = strategy flawed. (3) Quality gates are mandatory. (4) Planner dynamically chooses perspectives per task.

hooks.description: Remind about pipeline tracking after file modifications

steps.message: File modified. If executing a pipeline phase: track this change in the implementer_handoff artifact (files_changed field). If deviating from the plan, document the deviation. Run project formatters/linters if configured.
Protected path detected. This file is guarded by agent-pipeline rules (lock files, secrets, generated files, vendored code). Modification requires explicit plan acknowledgment.
